title: Kedarnath Trek Guide 2026 – Route, Difficulty, Tips
content: You trek 16km from Gaurikund to Kedarnath — 641m elevation gain, 4 to 6 hours depending on fitness. This guide covers the route stage by stage, what to carry, where to stop, pony and helicopter alternatives, and how to prepare if you're doing it for the first time.

title: Char Dham Yatra Complete Guide 2026
content: All four Char Dhams in one guide — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, Badrinath. We cover the complete route from Haridwar, what each dham feels like, day-by-day itinerary, costs, registration, packing and how to book. Updated for the 2026 season.

title: Kedarnath Yatra Package Guide – Cost, Itinerary & Booking
content: Kedarnath Yatra packages from Haridwar for 2026 — what they include, how to compare them, what we charge vs what aggregators charge, and exactly what you get for ₹6,499 vs ₹12,999. We run this trek ourselves. This guide tells you exactly what to expect.

title: Badrinath Temple Travel Guide 2026
content: Everything you need before your Badrinath darshan: opening times (4:30 AM Abhishek, 1 PM–9 PM general), how to book VIP darshan, Tapt Kund bathing ritual, Mana Village 3km beyond (India's last village before Tibet), and the evening Aarti at 7 PM.

title: Yamunotri Yatra Guide – Route, Trek & Tips
content: Yamunotri is the first and most intimate of the four dhams. You trek 6km from Janki Chatti. The Surya Kund (88°C hot spring) at the temple top is unlike anything at the other three dhams. This guide covers the trek, the ritual, what to carry, and how to get there from Haridwar.
description: Yamunotri is the first and most intimate of the four dhams. You trek 6km from Janki Chatti. The Surya Kund (88°C hot spring) at the temple top is unlike anything at the other three dhams. This guide covers the trek, the ritual, what to carry, and how to get there from Haridwar.

title: Gangotri Travel Guide – Route, Best Time & Tips
content: Gangotri is the only fully motorable Char Dham — you drive all the way to the temple. But the 100km Uttarkashi–Gangotri road through the Bhagirathi gorge is one of the most dramatic drives in Uttarakhand. This guide covers the route, Gaumukh glacier trek option, best time, and how to book.
description: Gangotri is the only fully motorable Char Dham — you drive all the way to the temple. But the 100km Uttarkashi–Gangotri road through the Bhagirathi gorge is one of the most dramatic drives in Uttarakhand. This guide covers the route, Gaumukh glacier trek option, best time, and how to book.

title: Kedarnath Helicopter Booking Guide 2026
content: Kedarnath helicopter tickets 2026: the three helipads (Phata, Sersi, Guptkashi), price range (₹7,500–₹9,500 one way), how to book on IRCTC heliyatra, why direct booking beats agents, and what to do when flights are cancelled by weather.
